mode_online_tooltip: Online Mode: Launch AI natural language analysis engine with cloud LLM support
mode_offline_tooltip: Offline Mode: Run disconnected, only local quick workflow buttons available
tool_pan_tip: Enable map panning (hold left mouse button to drag)
tool_zoom_in_tip: Enable box zoom in (hold left mouse button to drag a rectangle)
tool_zoom_out_tip: Enable box zoom out (click map or drag a rectangle)
btn_remove_tip: Remove selected layer from project (does not delete file)
btn_zoom_tip: Zoom map to the extent of the selected layer
canvas_tooltip: Drag and drop SHP, GeoJSON, TIF and other layer files here to load.
canvas_status: QGIS environment is not properly initialized.
ai_placeholder_online: Enter natural language spatial analysis command, e.g.: "Create a 30-meter buffer for the current layer"
ai_placeholder_offline: Offline Mode — Only quick workflow buttons available
ai_tooltip: AI will convert natural language commands into PyQGIS processing code and execute automatically.
btn_run_tip: Execute current AI geospatial analysis command
btn_screenshot_tip: Capture current canvas and execute command based on visual analysis
tip_cadastral: Batch convert layers to JGD2000 → Topology check & fix → Attribute normalization → Export standard SHP
tip_hydrology: Fill sinks → D8 flow direction → Flow accumulation → Stream network extraction → Gully density statistics
tip_batch_clip: Batch load multiple layers → Boundary clip → Unified JGD2000 → Categorized archive
tip_attribute_batch: Conditional filtering → Batch field assignment → Export SHP
tip_thematic_map: Legend/Scale/North arrow → Unified style rendering → Batch PNG/PDF
status_ready: System ready. Drag and drop SHP, GeoJSON, TIF and other layer files onto the map canvas.
status_offline_switched: Switched to Offline Mode. Only quick workflow buttons can be used.
status_online_switched: Switched to Online Mode. AI natural language engine is enabled.
status_pan: Current tool: Pan (hold left mouse button to drag the map)
status_zoom_in: Current tool: Zoom In (drag a rectangle area)
status_zoom_out: Current tool: Zoom Out (click or drag a rectangle area)
status_ai_thinking: AI is thinking and computing, please wait...
status_table_detected: {count} table file(s) detected, launching AI analysis...
status_offline_table_ignored: Offline Mode: Table file drag-and-drop ignored. Switch to Online Mode for AI table parsing.
status_ai_table_parsing: AI is parsing table and creating point data, please wait...
status_code_preview_off: Code preview disabled, AI code will execute directly
status_multimodal_off: Canvas screenshot analysis disabled, rolled back to text-only pipeline
status_ai_reset: AI context has been reset, code cache cleared.
status_api_saved: API configuration updated. New settings will be used for the next analysis.
status_project_saved: AIQGIS has auto-generated a high-quality map! Double-click the project file to open for layout and printing.
pipeline_all_done: Composite task pipeline fully completed ({total} step(s) total)
msg_offline_blocked:
Currently in Offline Mode. Only quick workflow buttons can be used.
Use the Quick Workflow buttons below, or switch to Online Mode.
msg_missing_instruction: Please enter a geospatial analysis command before running.
msg_missing_layer: No analyzable layers available. Please drag and drop at least one layer first.
msg_confirm_remove:
Are you sure you want to remove layer "{name}"?
This operation will not delete the original file.
msg_cannot_copy_raster: Copying raster layers is not supported yet.
msg_select_layer_first: Please select a layer in the layer list first.
msg_api_saved: API configuration updated. New settings will be used for the next analysis.
about_text:
AIQGIS

AI-Powered Lightweight Desktop GIS Application

Version 0.2.0

Powered by PyQGIS + DeepSeek

Open Source Project - GitHub
log_status_no_error: Total {total} lines in log | No errors
log_not_found: Log file has not been generated yet. Please run the program to trigger log recording.
code_preview_skip: Skip confirmation next time, execute directly (can be restored in settings)
code_preview_warning: Warning: Please review the code carefully to ensure it does not contain dangerous operations (file deletion, system calls, etc.).
api_config_note:
Tips:
• API Key can be obtained from DeepSeek Console
• Base URL is typically https://api.deepseek.com/v1
• Default model name is deepseek-chat
api_config_validate_url_format: Base URL must start with http:// or https://.
ai_placeholder_offline_local: Offline — Type natural language commands (Local LLM)...
err_local_llm_connection: Cannot connect to local LLM. Please ensure Ollama/LM Studio is running.
err_local_llm_timeout: Local LLM timed out. Try simplifying your query or using a faster model.
menu_cleanup_tip: Clear all temporary files under user_data
cleanup_confirm_msg: All temporary files, exports, and caches in user_data will be deleted. This cannot be undone. Continue?
tool_select_tip: Select features — drag a rectangle on the map to select features
tool_edit_tip: Toggle editing state of current vector layer
dialog_label_filter: SQL Expression (leave empty to clear filter):
